snapshot.note: Board data is VPS-first. KBS enriches fundamentals and ownership when available. CAN SLIM is the ticker-strength layer, while Wyckoff handles timing and entry logic. Market direction now includes an IBD-style pulse proxy and Wyckoff output includes a test checklist.

pulse.note: Distribution pressure is elevated with 6 active distribution days.
Distribution pressure is elevated with 6 active distribution days.
Distribution pressure is elevated with 5 active distribution days.

wyckoff.label: Accumulation Phase B - Early Base Repair

items.label: 1. Downside objective accomplished
items.detail: Point-and-Figure downside count is not implemented yet.

items.label: 2. Preliminary support / selling climax / test
items.detail: Needs visible stopping action, a spring, or a mature accumulation turn.

items.label: 3. Activity bullish
items.detail: Rallies should show better effort than reactions.

items.label: 4. Downward stride broken
items.detail: Price needs to stop respecting the old downtrend line or shelf.

items.label: 5. Higher lows
items.detail: The base should stop printing lower lows.

items.label: 6. Higher highs
items.detail: Demand should start winning the swing highs.

items.label: 7. Stock stronger than the market
items.detail: Relative strength should at least hold up versus VNINDEX.

items.label: 8. Base forming
items.detail: A tradable accumulation needs a box or cause to build against.

items.label: 9. Upside reward at least 3x risk
items.detail: No active long trigger exists yet, so reward/risk cannot be confirmed.

items.label: 1. Upside objective accomplished
items.detail: Point-and-Figure upside count is not implemented yet.

items.label: 2. Activity bearish
items.detail: Reactions should carry more pressure than rallies.

items.label: 3. Preliminary supply / buying climax
items.detail: Supply should be visible near the top or at the failed breakout.

items.label: 4. Stock weaker than the market
items.detail: Relative weakness should confirm the bearish case.

items.label: 5. Upward stride broken
items.detail: The prior uptrend should no longer be intact.

items.label: 6. Lower highs
items.detail: Bearish structures lose altitude on rallies.

items.label: 7. Lower lows
items.detail: Support breaks should create lower lows.

items.label: 8. Crown / supply range forming
items.detail: Distribution normally leaves a lateral crown before markdown expands.

items.label: 9. Downside reward at least 3x risk
items.detail: The damaged structure should still offer meaningful downside asymmetry.

action.label: Stay on watch, not on full risk
action.summary: The stock is building a box. That is useful, but it is not yet a valid expansion move.
steps: Track whether price respects the lower half of the range around 32.000.
Wait for volume to dry up on pullbacks and expand on up days.
Prepare two triggers: spring confirmation and breakout confirmation.
Keep powder dry until one of those triggers appears.
shouldAvoid: Do not buy the middle of the range without a trigger.
Do not average down if support fails.

entry.summary: This looks more like an early base repair than a confirmed trend reversal. Stay on watch until price reclaims repair levels, then the range ceiling.

watch.label: Early repair trigger
watch.why: A reclaim of 35.080 would be the first sign that sellers are losing control, but it is still not the full breakout.

watch.label: Full demand confirmation
watch.why: A decisive move through 39.898 is still needed before this becomes a real long setup.

entry.invalidation: If price loses 32.000 again, the base attempt is not mature enough.

reasoning.title: Trend Context
reasoning.detail: 40-session backdrop is downtrend; price is -9.1% vs SMA50 with 1M return -11.6%.

reasoning.title: Trading Range Map
reasoning.detail: 30-session support/resistance sit near 32.000 / 39.700; range width is 22.6% and the close sits at 27% of that box (lower third).

reasoning.title: Supply / Demand Event
reasoning.detail: No decisive spring, upthrust, SOS, or SOW is visible in the recent daily-bar window, so the read leans more on range position and trend state than on a fresh Wyckoff trigger.

reasoning.title: Phase Decision
reasoning.detail: The structure is classified as Accumulation Phase B - Early Base Repair because selling pressure is drying up, relative strength is holding better than the market, and price is trying to stabilize instead of extending the markdown.

reasoning.title: Wyckoff Tests
reasoning.detail: 4/7 buy tests passed. Supported tests are used as a confirmation layer; unsupported P&F tests stay explicitly unscored.

notes: Wyckoff output is inferred from daily OHLCV, not intraday tape.
The entry plan is only active when price behavior matches the listed confirmation condition.

action.label: No long entries in active markdown
action.summary: Trend and structure are both hostile. The correct action is patience.
steps: Stand aside while price stays below key moving averages and keeps making weak rebounds.
Wait for stopping action, a spring, or a new range before reconsidering any long.
Do not treat 74.200 as stable support if price is already below it.
Keep the name on a watchlist, not in a fresh long position.
shouldAvoid: Do not catch a falling knife in Phase E markdown.
Do not set a buy just because RSI looks low without structural repair.

entry.summary: Do not buy into active markdown. Wait for stopping action or a spring first.

watch.label: Early repair / stop bleeding trigger
watch.why: A reclaim of 83.560 would only improve the tape from damaged to repair mode. It is not the same as a confirmed buy yet.

watch.label: Full demand confirmation
watch.why: A decisive move through 94.771 is needed before the structure becomes a real buy setup.

entry.invalidation: A clean move below 73.829 keeps the structure defensive.

items.label: 1. Upside objective accomplished
items.detail: Point-and-Figure upside count is not implemented yet.

items.label: 2. Activity bearish
items.detail: Reactions should carry more pressure than rallies.

items.label: 3. Preliminary supply / buying climax
items.detail: Supply should be visible near the top or at the failed breakout.

items.label: 4. Stock weaker than the market
items.detail: Relative weakness should confirm the bearish case.

items.label: 5. Upward stride broken
items.detail: The prior uptrend should no longer be intact.

items.label: 6. Lower highs
items.detail: Bearish structures lose altitude on rallies.

items.label: 7. Lower lows
items.detail: Support breaks should create lower lows.

items.label: 8. Crown / supply range forming
items.detail: Distribution normally leaves a lateral crown before markdown expands.

items.label: 9. Downside reward at least 3x risk
items.detail: The damaged structure should still offer meaningful downside asymmetry.

action.label: No long entries in active markdown
action.summary: Trend and structure are both hostile. The correct action is patience.
steps: Stand aside while price stays below key moving averages and keeps making weak rebounds.
Wait for stopping action, a spring, or a new range before reconsidering any long.
Do not treat 71.600 as stable support if price is already below it.
Keep the name on a watchlist, not in a fresh long position.
shouldAvoid: Do not catch a falling knife in Phase E markdown.
Do not set a buy just because RSI looks low without structural repair.

entry.summary: Do not buy into active markdown. Wait for stopping action or a spring first.

watch.label: Early repair / stop bleeding trigger
watch.why: A reclaim of 83.720 would only improve the tape from damaged to repair mode. It is not the same as a confirmed buy yet.

watch.label: Full demand confirmation
watch.why: A decisive move through 102.409 is needed before the structure becomes a real buy setup.

entry.invalidation: A clean move below 71.242 keeps the structure defensive.

reasoning.title: Trend Context
reasoning.detail: 40-session backdrop is downtrend; price is -16.6% vs SMA50 with 1M return -13.6%.

reasoning.title: Trading Range Map
reasoning.detail: 30-session support/resistance sit near 71.600 / 101.900; range width is 39.4% and the close sits at 18% of that box (lower third).

reasoning.title: Supply / Demand Event
reasoning.detail: Recent structural signals: SOW on 2026-03-20 (1.43x vol).

reasoning.title: Phase Decision
reasoning.detail: The structure is classified as Markdown Phase E - Active Downtrend because the stock is still below trend support and no convincing stopping or spring event has appeared yet.

reasoning.title: Wyckoff Tests
reasoning.detail: 6/8 sell tests passed. Supported tests are used as a confirmation layer; unsupported P&F tests stay explicitly unscored.

notes: Wyckoff output is inferred from daily OHLCV, not intraday tape.
The entry plan is only active when price behavior matches the listed confirmation condition.
